# Third-Party CAD Sources

These files are community CAD models downloaded (May–June 2026) and used **only as visual
assets** in the interactive elevator demonstrations. They were not created by the team and
are credited to their original authors on GrabCAD.

| File | What it is | Source |
|------|-----------|--------|
| `CABINA.stp` | Passenger elevator cab | GrabCAD — "elevador de pasageros sistema" (snapshot 9) |
| `counterweight.x_t` | Elevator counterweight frame | GrabCAD — "elevator counterweight" (snapshot 4) |
| `elevator.dwg` | Elevator assembly drawing | GrabCAD — "elevator" |

Additional third-party meshes referenced by the demos (roller guide assembly, ram head,
cabin panel assembly STLs in `interactive-demos/elevator-viz/assets/`, and the 400 L water
tank + inline pump SolidWorks models) are likewise GrabCAD community models
("User Library-…" SolidWorks files, Turkish- and Spanish-named parts).

⚠️ Exact GrabCAD URLs and author names were not recorded at download time. Before any
public redistribution beyond fair demo use, the original listings should be located and
their licenses confirmed. The original download snapshots remain in `C:\Users\amaan\Downloads\`.
